# @andes/checkbox

<br />

Checkbox is an interactive component that allows the user to make multiple selections in an options list.

<br />

The UI specs are defined in _[Andes UI](http://andes.adminml.com) > [Checkbox](https://andes.mercadolibre.com/924dc6ec5/p/55aacd-checkbox/b/26f535)_.

<br />

## How to use

<br />

### Installation

> Follow the [general installation guide](../../docs/installation.md).

```bash

npm install --save @andes/checkbox

```

### Styles

> Follow the [general styles usage guide](../../docs/styles-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your bundle:

```css
@import '@andes/checkbox/index';
```

Or you can import only the styles that you need in your project like this:

```css
/* Base */
@import '@andes/checkbox/base';

/* Highlight */
@import '@andes/checkbox/lib/styles/highlight';

/* Indeterminate */
@import '@andes/checkbox/lib/styles/indeterminate';

/* Error */
@import '@andes/checkbox/lib/styles/error';
```

> Always import `@andes/checkbox/base` and then only the styles that you need.

### Scripts

> Follow the [general scripts usage guide](../../docs/scripts-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your page:

```jsx

import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';

```

## Public API

| Property         | Description                                                                                                               | Type                         | Default     | Required |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | ----------- | -------- |
| `checked`        | Whether the checkbox should be checked or not (controlled behaviour)                                                      | `boolean`                    | `undefined` |          |
| `className`      | Custom class                                                                                                              | `string`                     | `undefined` |          |
| `defaultChecked` | Whether the checkbox should be checked by default (uncontrolled behaviour)                                                | `boolean`                    | `undefined` |          |
| `disabled`       | Whether the checkbox should be disabled                                                                                   | `boolean`                    | `false`     |          |
| `error`          | Whether the Checkbox should have an error                                                                                 | `boolean`                    | `false`     |          |
| `id`             | Unique identifier                                                                                                         | `string`                     | `undefined` |          |
| `highlight`      | Whether the checkbox should be highlighted.                                                                               | `boolean`                    | `false`     |          |
| `indeterminate`  | Whether the checkbox should appear as indeterminate when is selected.                                                     | `boolean`                    | `false`     |          |
| `inputProps`     | [Attributes](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#attributes) applied to the input element.    | `object`                     | `{}`        |          |
| `label`          | Text to display next to the checkbox                                                                                      | `string, node`               | `''`        |          |
| `labelPosition`  | Checkbox label position                                                                                                   | `'left',  'right'`           | `'right'`   |          |
| `onChange`       | Function to execute when `change` event triggers                                                                          | `function(event)`            | `undefined` |          |
| `srLabel`        | Label that describes the Checkbox functionality for screen readers                                                        | `string`                     | `undefined` |          |

## Examples

For full demo and configuration options, check out the [story for Checkbox](https://andes.adminml.com/web/?path=/story/checkbox--playground).

### Basic checkbox

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Basic.png" alt="Basic Checkbox Example" width="350">

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <Checkbox defaultChecked id="example-checkbox" label="I accept the terms and conditions" />
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/base';
```

### Without visible label

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Without-Label.png" alt="Without Visible Label Checkbox Example" width="350">

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <Checkbox defaultChecked id="example-checkbox" srLabel="Checkbox label" />
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/base';
```

### Highlight

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Highlighted.png" alt="Highlight Checkbox Example" width="350">

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <Checkbox
    id="example-checkbox"
    label="I accept the terms and conditions"
    highlight
  />
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/base';
@import '@andes/checkbox/lib/styles/highlight';
```

import React from 'react';

### Indeterminate

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Indeterminate.png" alt="Indeterminate Checkbox Example" width="350">

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <Checkbox
    defaultChecked
    id="example-checkbox"
    label="I accept the terms and conditions"
    indeterminate
  />
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/base';
@import '@andes/checkbox/lib/styles/indeterminate';
```

### Nested Checkboxes

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Nested.gif" alt="Nested Checkboxes Example" width="350">

```jsx
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import { VisuallyHidden } from '@andes/visually-hidden';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => {
  const [checked, setChecked] = useState([false, true]);

  const handleChangeParent = (event) => {
    setChecked([event.target.checked, event.target.checked]);
  };

  const handleChangeFirstChild = (event) => {
    setChecked([event.target.checked, checked[1]]);
  };

  const handleChangeSecondChild = (event) => {
    setChecked([checked[0], event.target.checked]);
  };

  return (
    <div className="checkbox-story-container">
      <fieldset className="checkbox-fieldset">
        <legend>
          <VisuallyHidden>Parent controlled Checkboxes</VisuallyHidden>
        </legend>
        <Checkbox
          id="parent-checkbox"
          label="Parent"
          checked={checked[0] || checked[1]}
          indeterminate={checked[0] !== checked[1]}
          onChange={handleChangeParent}
          inputProps={{ 'aria-controls': "children-checkbox-1 children-checkbox-2" }}
        />
        <ul className="checkbox-children-container">
          <li>
            <Checkbox
              id="children-checkbox-1"
              label="First child"
              checked={checked[0]}
              onChange={handleChangeFirstChild}
            />
          </li>
          <li>
            <Checkbox
              id="children-checkbox-2"
              label="Second child"
              checked={checked[1]}
              onChange={handleChangeSecondChild}
            />
          </li>
        </ul>
      </fieldset>
    </div>
  );
};

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/index';

.checkbox-story-container {
  .checkbox-fieldset {
    border: 0;
  }

  .checkbox-children-container {
    list-style: none;
    margin-top: 24px;
    padding-left: 32px;

    li:not(:last-child) {
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
  }
}
```

## Theming

This component supports theming. It allows you to pass a `customTheme` object to it adjusting colors, typography, spacing and styles to align with a brand's visual identity, user preferences or project requirements.

<br />

The `customTheme` object can make use of values 窶銀脚eferenced in the component or CSS properties for quick customization or make use of style overrides according to `data-attributes` specific to the component for more complex cases. We do not recommend the latter since it will be deprecated in the future.

<br />

### Using Referenced Component Values

The checkbox allows you to modify the following attributes depending on whether it contains `highlight` or directly its reference value.

| Sub Attribute | Description           |
| ------------- | --------------------- |
| `fill`        | Checkbox fill color.  |
| `text`        | Checkbox text color.  |
| `border`      | Checkbox border. |

```jsx
const customTheme = {
  components: {
    checkbox: {
      color: {
        [referenceValue]: {
          fill: {
            [state]: fillColorValue,
          },
          border: {
            [state]: fillColorValue,
          },
        },
        icon: {
          default: baseColor,
          disabled: disabledColor,
        },
        text: {
          default: baseColor,
          disabled: disabledColor,
        },
      },
    },
  },
};
```

The possible case values 窶銀蟻re:

```jsx

status: default | hover | active | disabled | error | base;

```

The possible reference values 窶銀蟻re:

```jsx

referenceValue: selected | indeterminate | unselected;

```

> More states may be added in the future, so we recommend consulting the @andes/themes/meli-themes/ml.json file for more detailed information

### Example

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Reference-Theming.gif" alt="Reference Theming Checkbox Example" width="300" />

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import { AndesThemeProvider } from '@andes/themes';
import './styles.scss';

const customTheme = {
  components: {
    checkbox: {
      color: {
        selected: {
          fill: {
            default: '#232732',
            hover: '#616161',
          },
        },
        text: {
          default: '#000',
        },
      },
    },
  },
};

const MyComponent = () => (
  <AndesThemeProvider theme={customTheme}>
    <Checkbox label="I accept the terms and conditions" defaultChecked />
  </AndesThemeProvider>
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/index';
```

> Remember that it is not necessary for the ThemeProvider to be next to the component you want to customize. Ideally it should be at the App level, wrapping your entire page.

### Using CSS Properties

The component allows passing CSS properties following this structure:

```jsx
const customTheme = {
  components: {
    checkbox: {
      [cssProperty]: propertyValue,
    },
  },
};
```

> Please note that styles applied in this way will impact all Andes checkbox regardless of their variant. Additionally, they have higher precedence than styles applied using referenced component values.

#### Example

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-CSS-Properties-Theming.gif" alt="CSS Properties Theming Checkbox Example" width="300" />


```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import { AndesThemeProvider } from '@andes/themes';
import './styles.scss';

const customTheme = {
  components: {
    checkbox: {
      display: 'flex',
      alignItems: 'center',
      justifyContent: 'center',
      backgroundColor: '#8cb4f0',
      marginLeft: '20px',
      borderRadius: '4px',
      height: '31px',
      width: '270px',
    },
  },
};

const MyComponent = () => (
  <AndesThemeProvider theme={customTheme}>
    <Checkbox label="I accept the terms and conditions" defaultChecked />
  </AndesThemeProvider>
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/index';
```

> Remember that it is not necessary for the ThemeProvider to be next to the component you want to customize. Ideally it should be at the App level, wrapping your entire page.

### Using `styleOverrides`

This component has a series of `data-attributes` that serve as a hook to style complex cases:

| data-attribute                       | Description                                                                          |
| ------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `data-andes-checkbox`                | Checkbox tag.                                                                        |
| `data-andes-checkbox-container`      | Checkbox container input.                                                            |
| `data-andes-checkbox-input`          | Checkbox input.                                                                      |
| `data-andes-checkbox-label`          | Checkbox label.                                                                      |
| `data-andes-checkbox-variant`        | Checkbox variant. Can be: `'highlight'`.                            |
| `data-andes-state`                   | Checkbox tag state. Can be: `'checked'`, `'disabled'`, `'error'`, or `'indeterminate'`.  |

Taking advantage of the them, you can use an entry called `styleOverrides` where you can add styles according to any `data-attribute`.

### Example

<img src="resources/checkbox/docs/Checkbox-Example-Style-Overrides-Theming.gif" alt="Style Overrides Theming Checkbox Example" width="300" />


```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { Checkbox } from '@andes/checkbox';
import { AndesThemeProvider } from '@andes/themes';
import './styles.scss';

const customTheme = {
  components: {
    checkbox: {
      styleOverrides: {
        '[data-andes-checkbox-input]::after': {
          backgroundColor: '#232732',
          width: '24px',
          height: '24px',
        },
        '[data-andes-checkbox-label]': {
          color: '#000',
        },
      },
    },
  },
};

const MyComponent = () => (
  <AndesThemeProvider theme={customTheme}>
    <Checkbox label="I accept the terms and conditions" defaultChecked />
  </AndesThemeProvider>
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/checkbox/index';
```

> Remember that it is not necessary for the ThemeProvider to be next to the component you want to customize. Ideally it should be at the App level, wrapping your entire page.
